hero.title: Latest MKS site changes.
hero.subtitle: A concise release log for page redesigns, docs structure, roadmap progress, and static site updates.

releases.title: Docs synced to not-stable and prerelease readiness checked
releases.summary: Documentation and release messaging now reflect the actual state of the MKS interpreter not-stable branch, with unstable areas marked directly in the docs and local build checks recorded.
items: Reworked Docs around the current not-stable branch instead of the older public copy, including updated import examples, package flow, and branch-specific guidance.
Added red Not-Stable badges to sections where semantics are still moving, especially imports, pointers, and package-level behavior.
Added Hugeicons-based visual markers to the Docs sidebar and section metadata so unstable and reference sections scan faster.
Updated the Docs hero and section data to reference README, REFERENCE, USER_GUIDE, PACKAGES, and local verification against the interpreter repository.
Verified the interpreter branch locally with a successful CMake configure, a successful build, passing ctest, and passing ./tests.sh integration coverage.
Positioned the current branch as suitable for a GitHub prerelease rather than a stable release because the repository still describes the surface as experimental and subject to change.

releases.title: Site-wide redesign and roadmap advance
releases.summary: Visual and structural pass across the static site: shared navigation, cleaner docs, roadmap progression, and calmer page design.
items: Moved the site header into a shared component so every page uses the same navigation markup and active-state behavior.
Redesigned the global header into a consistent macOS-style dock and kept it shared across Home, Docs, Roadmap, Examples, Playground, and Changelog.
Restructured Docs navigation from data, removed duplicate documentation sections, and grouped the sidebar without changing the meaning of the remaining docs.
Updated Docs cards with a more readable text font and fixed sidebar scrolling so manual scrollbar movement is no longer pulled back by active-link syncing.
Advanced the Roadmap from 0.0.2 toward 0.0.3, marked the cookbook work as complete, and highlighted stdlib and playground workflow as the active next tracks.
Refreshed Roadmap visuals with a calmer path badge, softer cards, clearer done/live/next states, and no content rewrite.
Updated cache-busting query strings for changed CSS, JS, and JSON-backed pages so GitHub Pages serves the current assets.

releases.title: Docs and examples redesign
releases.summary: Major website pass focused on practical English docs, richer example browsing, standard library coverage, and a cleaner roadmap.
items: Docs reshaped into 50 practical sections with cookbook-style explanations and stdlib usage for std/math, std/array, std/string, std/bool, and std/time.
Examples page redesigned as a searchable snippet browser with 48 cards, 2 featured examples, stronger filtering, and no unsupported alias-import patterns.
Roadmap rewritten around useful next steps: learning surface, stdlib UX, playground workflow, tooling, and runtime strength.
Changelog redesigned into a cleaner release feed with search, filters, stats, and stronger visual hierarchy.
Russian user-facing copy removed; public site content is English-first.

releases.title: GC playground
releases.summary: Standalone GC visualizer with sweep animation, default light theme, and errors with inline highlighting.
items: interactive mark/sweep visualizer
inline error highlights
clearer runtime diagnostics

releases.title: Docs cleanup
releases.summary: Docs reorganized into concise examples, with stdlib and contribution guidance added.
items: reference examples tightened
stdlib notes expanded
contribution path clarified

releases.title: Roadmap polish
releases.summary: Roadmap page got sharper cards, simplified content, and a clearer path from current work to future compiler ideas.
items: roadmap structure simplified
progress cards updated
future track made easier to scan
